memberdef.argsstring: (FIL *fp, UINT(*func)(const BYTE *, UINT), UINT btf, UINT *bf)
memberdef.name: f_forward

memberdef.argsstring: (const TCHAR *path, const MKFS_PARM *opt, void *work, UINT len)
